footer.marcaDesc: We formulate professional cleaning and maintenance products for nautical, caravanning and industrial use. Three generations of the same craft, from Tarragona.

home.heroH1: Professional products for your boat, vehicle
home.heroSub: Three generations formulating cleaning, maintenance and polishing products for the most demanding shipyards, workshops and professionals.
home.trustAtencionSub: We call you if you need it
home.catsSub: Three product families formulated for the most demanding environments.
home.catNauticaDesc: Cleaners, polishes and protectors for gelcoat, fibreglass, teak, engines and everything exposed to the marine environment.
home.catCaravaningDesc: Cleaning and maintenance for caravans, motorhomes and camper vans. So they last mile after mile.
home.catIndustrialDesc: Pre-MOT additives, degreasers and rust removers for heavy vehicles, mechanical workshops and industrial cleaning.
home.antesSub: No filters, no editing. This is how surfaces look after using our products.
home.ventajasAsesoramientoSub: Talk to the people who make it. No middlemen, no bots. Three generations of craft.

nosotros.heroDesc: We formulate cleaning and maintenance products for the most demanding environments: shipyards, mechanical workshops, and caravanning professionals.
nosotros.historiaP1: Grupo Lambea was founded in 1952 as a metallurgical company, manufacturing components for the most important shipyards in the Mediterranean. That direct experience with marine environments —humidity, salt, corrosion— taught us what truly works.
nosotros.historiaP2: Over time, we transitioned from manufacturing parts to manufacturing the products those parts needed to last. Today, we are a chemical company with our own formulas and toxicological registration, serving professionals in the nautical, caravanning, and industrial sectors.
nosotros.historiaP3: Three generations later, Francisco Lambea is still at the helm. No intermediaries. No franchises. The same values of craftsmanship and rigor that we applied to the first engine we treated in '52.
nosotros.historiaQuote: Our extensive experience manufacturing for mega yachts and top-tier shipyards made us specialists in formulating what truly endures.
nosotros.cardFormulaD: We develop each product based on years of real-world use in shipyards and workshops. Nothing outsourced, nothing generic.
nosotros.cardRegistroD: All our products have a toxicological registration number. Compliant with European regulations and CLP labelling.
nosotros.cardBioD: Formulated to be effective without harming the environment. Especially important in nautical and industrial applications.
nosotros.cardCalidadD: Every batch undergoes control before dispatch. We guarantee the consistency professionals need with every use.
nosotros.cardEspanaD: We produce in our own facilities in Tarragona. Complete traceability, without relying on third parties.
nosotros.cardOficioD: It's not marketing. We've spent decades in the same environments as our clients, and that shows in every formula.
nosotros.cardSectoresD: Nautical, caravanning, and industrial. Different products for different environments, with the same high standards for all.
nosotros.cardFamiliarD: The third generation is front and centre. No call centres. When you call, you speak to someone who knows the product.
nosotros.secNauticaDesc: Gelcoat cleaners, marine rust removers, fibre polishes, teak products, and outboard engine cleaning. Tested in saltwater.
nosotros.secCaravaningDesc: Awning cleaners, plastic surface polishes, water tank products, and general maintenance for recreational vehicles.
nosotros.secIndustrialDesc: Pre-MOT additives for diesel and petrol, industrial degreasers, injector cleaners, and maintenance products for fleets and mechanical workshops.
nosotros.ctaTexto: Tell us your case and we'll recommend the exact product. We've been solving the same problems you face today for decades.
